market_context: Decision eve: June CPI prints tomorrow 14:30 Prague, the same morning JPM/C/GS open earnings season — the single most consequential macro morning of the month, with the 10Y near 4.6% and May CPI having run hot at 4.2%. Tape into it: calm (VIX ~16, SPY ~751 above the 742 line). SKHY post-listing: opened 170, closed day 1 at 168 (+13% over the 149 issue), then compressed toward Seoul parity (~145) — your restructured 152.50 fill caught the flush with only ~5% premium left in it. LMT stopped out Friday at 513 (-~500 CZK; the guidance-raise thesis now gets tested without us — re-entry only on a post-earnings reclaim of 540). Book: 9 positions, 63% invested, ~29k free cash held at the CPI gate — deployment triggers below fire AFTER tomorrow's print, not before.

position_actions.action: PLACE STOP 147 NOW — the position is stopless; then run the plan: trims 167.5 / 183 / 198, decision point Wednesday
position_actions.reason: Filled 2 ADRs at 152.50 (~6.5k CZK, +87 already) — the restructured entry worked: you bought a ~5% premium to Seoul parity instead of the +42% the open-chasers paid (day 1: open 170, close 168, then the fade you caught). Now the discipline: (1) stop 147 immediately — below the 149 issue price the bookbuild allocants are underwater and selling cascades; (2) first trim at 167.5 — note it coincides with the day-1 close, natural resistance; (3) your 2-day timer lands Wednesday. One honest fork: the original timer assumed a pump-fade ride; your actual entry is a premium-compression value fill, so if SKHY holds above 152.5 through the CPI print, converting the remainder to a small long-hold (60% HBM share, the purest AI-memory ADR) with the same 147 stop is legitimate — but decide it consciously Wednesday, don't drift into it.

position_actions.action: HOLD 0.6 through tomorrow's print with the 345 TP limit working — the size-down WAS the protection
position_actions.reason: 337.54 (+50 CZK). Earnings + CPI tomorrow morning. The half you sold at 335.50 Friday already took the binary risk off; a stop wouldn't protect the rest anyway (earnings gaps jump stops). Keeping the 345 limit means a strong print pays you into strength automatically. If the print disappoints, the framework rule applies: guidance disappointment = sell, at market, same day.

position_actions.action: HOLD — 7.22, five percent above the 6.85 stop; the stop decides, not us
position_actions.reason: -520 CZK, the book's red lantern since LMT left. The Cyberhawk Q3 close and defense-budget flow remain real catalysts, the chart remains broken. No averaging, no stop-moving: either it holds the shelf or the 6.85 stop enforces the exit (re-entry: reclaim 7.70 with two green closes, unchanged).

position_actions.action: HOLD — stop 179 correctly re-placed on the full position; sell 205 is now a manual level
position_actions.reason: 185.40 (+432 CZK). You chose full-size stop protection over the resting 205 TP limit (T212 makes you pick) — right choice into a CPI week. Sell ~40% manually if 205 prints; runner logic for 250 unchanged. Earnings Jul 29.

position_actions.action: HOLD — stop 75 live on full size; 100 is the manual TP level
position_actions.reason: 87.45 (+255 CZK). Same structure choice as QCOM, same verdict. The Meta-overhang headlines have gone quiet and the AI-infra complex is basing; 100/118 targets stand.

position_actions.action: HOLD — the split is textbook: 318 limit on 0.42, stop 294 on 0.63
position_actions.reason: 316.40 (+248 CZK), the 318 TP is one good day away. After it prints, raise the remainder stop to 302. Earnings Jul 30.

position_actions.action: HOLD — long-hold designation active, +85 CZK, nothing to do
position_actions.reason: 210.14 vs 206.84 entry, stop 183 live, sells 240/258, earnings Aug 27. Weekly-review cadence per the long-hold policy — next look Friday.

position_actions.action: HOLD — full 11.3 covered by both stops at 46.5
position_actions.reason: 49.48 (-76 CZK), coiling under 50 with the Aug 6 print as the timer. Long-hold candidacy assessed after that print.
House money from the +22% round-trip. If the AI-infra leg reignites post-CPI, it participates; if not, the stop returns the winnings.

position_actions.action: STOPPED at 513 Friday (-~500 CZK) — re-entry trigger set, watching the Jul 21 print from the sidelines
position_actions.reason: The raised-guidance thesis didn't hold the technical level and the stop enforced the rules. If earnings vindicate the story: re-entry on a post-print reclaim of 540, sized fresh. No regret trades before that.

watchlist.note: ~29k free fires AFTER tomorrow's 14:30 print, in this order: (1) LITE ~8-10k on a pullback into 745-765 holding (stop 714, below the old shelf) or a fresh base; (2) financials leg ~5k (JPM re-add or XLF) if the JPM print + guidance land well; (3) SKHY add ~4k only above 160 post-CPI as part of a conscious long-hold re-designation. Hot CPI = queue frozen, stops work, reassess Wednesday
watchlist.trigger: June CPI, Tue Jul 14, 14:30 Prague — cool + SPY holds 742 = deploy; hot = freeze

watchlist.note: ~785 after the missed 715 entry — the long-hold thesis (Nvidia $2B, +105% guide) is untouched, only the price ran
watchlist.trigger: Pullback into 745-765 that holds, or a multi-day base -> re-mapped entry with stop 714
Daily close > 17.80, else re-run on the Jul 30 print
Reclaim 14.00 on volume or skip the Jul 27 binary
